column1: # Sweep 35 — N1b re-test: EMA blend-at-eval with current locked config (2026-04-25)

# alpha=1.0 is pure EMA (baseline). Lower alpha blends in base model weights.
# DECISION: any alpha must beat alpha=1.0 by ≥0.003 BPB to lock. If winner: queue N=3.
